name: Duct System Replacement – 1.5 Ton
features: Remove & dispose of existing duct system
Install new insulated flex duct throughout
Test & balance system for optimal airflow
description: Remove & dispose of existing supply and return duct system; daily job-site clean-up; disconnect & reconnect HVAC equipment as needed; test & balance system upon completion; up to 2 follow-up visits included to balance comfort issues; 10-year workmanship guarantee on supply & return ducting system.
